description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical plant pot with a slightly tapered body and a wide, octagonal rim. The pot features smooth, unadorned surfaces with a matte finish, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. Its walls are moderately thick, suggesting durability and stability for outdoor or indoor use. The opening at the top is broad, allowing for easy planting and maintenance of medium-sized plants. The color is a uniform light gray, which complements contemporary urban environments. There are no visible decorative patterns or drainage holes on the exterior.
description: A smooth, light gray, cylindrical plant pot with a wide octagonal rim and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide octagonal rim and smooth, slightly tapered cylindrical body.
description_view_1: Side view similar to the front, highlighting the consistent taper and unadorned surface.
description_view_2: Another angled view, emphasizing the pot's uniform shape and broad opening.
description_view_3: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same smooth, matte finish and octagonal rim.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in modern urban parks or residential entryways
